client.request: AI workflow audit and implementation roadmap

executive_summary.title: Sample Client — AI Delivery Readiness Report
executive_summary.summary: This report translates machine-generated AndyAI Second Brain artifacts into a human-readable delivery surface for the request: AI workflow audit and implementation roadmap.
executive_summary.trust_note: This report is generated from verified local artifacts and should be reviewed by a human operator before client delivery.

recommendations.title: Clarify the business workflow
recommendations.body: Map the current process, expected output, human approval points and risk boundaries.

recommendations.title: Start with a governed pilot
recommendations.body: Use a small scoped automation before connecting sensitive systems or production data.

recommendations.title: Keep evidence visible
recommendations.body: Every generated recommendation should link back to source artifacts, reports and verification logs.

recommendations.title: Separate operator view from client view
recommendations.body: Keep raw artifact panels internal and expose only clear, trusted, designed outputs to clients.

evidence_trust_block.verification: Core verify, brain-check and battle pack verification artifacts are available in the operator layer.
evidence_trust_block.human_gate: Human approval is required before external delivery or deployment.

next_actions: Replace sample intake with real client intake.
Publish client-facing page only after human approval.
